chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ مِنِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 176 – What is Permissible for the man, from his woman, and she is menstruating

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/381)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/381)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْحَائِضِ مَا يَحِلُّ لِزَوْجِهَا مِنْهَا قَالَ مَا دُونَ الْفَرْجِ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the menstruating woman, what is Permissible for her husband, from her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Whatever is besides the front private part’.
en.sarwar: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what is permissible for a man to enjoy with his wife during her experiencing Hayd (menses). He (the Imam) said, ‘Everything except her vulva.’”
